name: kaanha-dev
description: Centralized dev-server hub: one registry in the ops home (KAANHA_HOME or ~/.claude/kaanha) for every project's dev server with unique ports, a stdlib launcher (list/start/stop/status/logs), sync generation of per-project .claude/launch.json files, and a SessionStart scan that auto-enrols new projects and keeps the 24/7 fleet covering every one of them.
